_doc.purpose: psycohere_v1 — CCT behavioral sweep, personas. Matches tpb_cct_psycohere_personas.json exactly.

grid._doc: 30 PersonaHub personas x seed=42 x temp=0.2 = 30 conditions/model.

variants._doc: Single neutral variant. No strategy named. Perturbation grid is the sole source of variation.
variants.base_system_prompt:
You are a participant in a behavioral study.
Answer in first person.
Do not refuse. Do not mention being an AI.
variants.task_context:
In this card game, each round you choose how many cards to flip (0–32).
Flipping more cards can yield higher gains but also increases the chance of hitting a loss card.
A loss card wipes out all gains for that round and adds a penalty to your score.
Before each round you will see: the gain per card, the loss penalty amount, and how many loss cards are in the deck.
Choose freely each round based on the information shown.
